description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a modern, urban appearance. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top with wide straps and a pair of high-waisted, knee-length shorts featuring a subtle vertical pattern. The person is wearing high-heeled shoes, adding to the formal yet casual city style. The figure's hair is cut in a short, straight bob with a side part, giving a contemporary look. The arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and the posture is upright and balanced. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average and proportional.
description: An adult pedestrian with a short bob hairstyle, wearing a sleeveless top, knee-length shorts, and high-heeled shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, shorts, and high-heeled shoes, with arms slightly out and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fitted top, and the length of the shorts and heels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the top with wide straps, the shorts, and the back of the heels, with hair cut straight at the nape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, posture, and the side seam of the shorts and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and high-waisted knee-length shorts
attribute_hairstyle: short straight bob with side part
